EXPLAINATION: Unique key to link attendance with employee master record
Employee name (fetched from master, not manually entered)
Employee’s department for filtering and reporting
Employee role/title for hierarchy-based analysis
Site/Client location where employee is assigned/worked
Primary attendance date used for reporting and payroll
Auto-derived day (e.g., Monday) from Business Date
Auto-derived month for aggregation and reporting
Shift assigned to employee for that day (reference to shift rules)
Expected check-in time from shift definition
Expected check-out time from shift definition
Allowed delay before marking lateness
Actual system date of check-in (for audit/overnight shifts)
Actual check-in time used for lateness calculation
Distance from allowed location to validate attendance authenticity
Actual system date of check-out
Actual check-out time used for work duration
Distance from allowed location at check-out
Final payable time (formatted output derived from work minutes)
Total worked duration in minutes (system-calculated)
Extra time beyond shift end (system-calculated)
Final attendance result (Present / Late / Absent / Leave / Completed)
Minutes late based on shift start + grace
Yes/No indicator if employee is late
Minutes left before shift end
Indicates missing clock-in or clock-out
Indicates if record was modified manually

Justification for manual modification of record
